zh.Stoke, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Walter de Stanley於1072年出生在英國斯塔福爾斯坦利時，他的父親Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh22歲，母親Mabella Stoneley22歲。他於1204年與Clemence de Blore在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他於1230年登記服兵役。他去世於1137年在英國斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特享年65歲，埋葬在英國爾阿斯特伯里聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Walter de Stanley于1072年出生在英国斯塔福爾斯坦利时，他的父亲Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh22岁，母亲Mabella Stoneley22岁。他于1204年与Clemence de Blore在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他于1230年登记服兵役。他去世于1137年在英国斯塔福爾斯托可--特倫特享年65岁，埋葬在英国爾阿斯特伯里聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Walter de Stanley was born in 1072, in Stanley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh, was 22 and his mother, Mabella Stoneley, was 22. He married Clemence de Blore in 1204, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He registered for military service in 1230. He died in 1137, in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Walter de Stanley est né en 1072, à Stanley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mabella Stoneley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Clemence de Blore en 1204, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1230. Il est décédé en 1137, à Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Walter de Stanley 1072 in Stanley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh 22 und seine Mutter Mabella Stoneley 22. Er hat 1204 in Lancashire, England Clemence de Blore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er hat sich 1230 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1137 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Walter de Stanley è nato il nel 1072 nel Stanley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mabella Stoneley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Clemence de Blore nel 1204, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1230. Morì nel 1137, nel Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Walter de Stanleyが1072年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタンリーで生まれた時，父Adam III de Aldithley of Stanleghは22歳，母Mabella Stoneleyは22歳であった。1204年にイギリスランカシュアイアでClemence de Bloreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1230年に兵役登録をした。彼は1137年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアストケ-オン-トレントで65歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアアストブリーサイント マリ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: 영국 체실르 애스트버이 세인트 마이'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Walter de Stanley(이)가 1072년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스탠리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabella Stoneley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1204년 영국 랭카실르에서 Clemence de Blore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1137년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스토케--트렌트에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 애스트버이 세인트 마이'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Walter de Stanley nasceu em 1072, em Stanley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mabella Stoneley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Clemence de Blore em 1204, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1230. Ele faleceu em 1137, em Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire,: сеинт мэри'с чурч, астбури, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Walter de Stanley родился в 1072 г. в местности стэнли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam III de Aldithley of Stanlegh было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mabella Stoneley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence de Blore в 1204 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. В 1230 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1137 г. в местности стоке-он-трент, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт мэри'с чурч, астбури, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Clemence de Blore en 1204, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1230. Murió en 1137, en Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Saint Mary's Church, Astbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
